description: Cancer Ecology Digital Twin adapter mappings — Phase 6 ACTIVE. Rewrites the Phase 1 seed with 8 complete adapters, each binding a module's ACTUAL output_port names (from Phase-2 typed ports) to twin state variables defined in twin_state_schema.json. Covers all five CEDT layers (host, exposure, tissue, metabolic, state_quality).

adapters.description: Maps the Exposure Wave2 module's real output ports (exposure_multiplier, tissue_conc_uM) into CEDT exposure-layer state variables. Also captures the categorical exposure class and scenario context from module inputs. Maturity C module: outputs are lookup-based, no regression-tested numeric calculation, but exposure_multiplier is a real scalar from the param record.

mappings.provenance_note: exposure_intensity = run.computed_trace.exposure_step.exposure_multiplier (multiplier_vs_baseline from WAVE2 params). Real value from Phase 5 run trace.
Direct identity copy of exposure_multiplier to the twin exposure layer.
exposure_class derived from scenario's carcinogen_class field (categorical). tissue_conc_uM is the dose context; the class is stored alongside it for twin traceability.
exposure_duration_context = scenario exposure_scenario key (e.g. smoker, developing_country_moderate). Categorical from scenario definition, not a numeric port value.

adapters.description: Maps the Biotransformation/Flux module's three real output ports (activation_score, detoxification_score, flux_ratio) into CEDT metabolic-layer state variables. All three values are computed via Michaelis-Menten kinetics from real Km/Vmax parameters and are regression-tested at 1e-6 tolerance. This is the primary twin-ready (T) mapping.

mappings.provenance_note: metabolic_activation_score = run.computed_trace.flux_step.activation_score. Real MM-computed value; regression-tested.
metabolic_detoxification_score = run.computed_trace.flux_step.detoxification_score. Real MM-computed value; 0.0 when all detox enzymes lack Vmax.

metabolic_flux_ratio = run.computed_trace.flux_step.flux_ratio = activation_score / max(detoxification_score, 0.001). Core regression-tested output. This mapping is the primary evidence for FLUX maturity E→T promotion.

adapters.description: Maps the Interaction mechanism module's output ports into CEDT metabolic state variables. GSH_pool_fraction maps to metabolic gsh_pool_fraction. Synergy/antagonism flags are categorical outputs that inform susceptibility qualitatively. Note: INTERACTION module was not run in the 4 Phase 5 scenarios (no co-exposure inputs supplied), so these mappings produce null values in twin_states.json for those scenarios — explicitly documented.

mappings.provenance_note: gsh_pool_fraction = INTERACTION module GSH_pool_fraction output. Null in Phase 5 scenarios (INTERACTION not run — no co-exposure inputs). Would be populated in co-exposure scenarios.
synergy_flag is a boolean indicating co-exposure synergy. Qualitatively maps to elevated susceptibility (susceptibility_index modifier). Categorical, no numeric value in Phase 5 scenarios; null.

adapters.description: Maps the OxStress mechanism module's output ports (ROS_burden, oxidative_adduct_score) into CEDT state_quality layer variables (oxidative_stress_level, adduct_burden). OxStress was not run in Phase 5's 4 canonical scenarios (which used PAH/Aflatoxin/AromaticAmines/Nitrosamine with no explicit heavy-metal ROS input), so both variables are null with documented reason.

mappings.provenance_note: oxidative_stress_level = OxStress.ROS_burden output. Null in all 4 Phase 5 scenarios — OxStress module was not invoked (no heavy-metal or direct ROS input provided). Would be populated in scenarios with Arsenic/HeavyMetal class.
adduct_burden = OxStress.oxidative_adduct_score. Null in Phase 5 scenarios for same reason as oxidative_stress_level.

adapters.description: Maps the PopGen susceptibility modifier module's activity_multiplier output into CEDT host-layer state variables. Each per-enzyme genotype multiplier becomes a keyed entry in enzyme_activity_modifier. A composite susceptibility_index is derived as the mean multiplier across all enzymes in the scenario.

mappings.provenance_note: enzyme_activity_modifier = {gene: genotype_multiplier} dict for each enzyme in the run. Values extracted from run.computed_trace.flux_step.per_enzyme_mm_rates[*].genotype_multiplier. Real values from Phase 5 run outputs.
susceptibility_index = mean(genotype_multiplier) across all enzymes in the scenario. Derived from the same per_enzyme_mm_rates genotype_multiplier values as enzyme_activity_modifier.

adapters.description: Maps the Tissue Subgraph module's tissue_expression_weight output into CEDT tissue-layer state variables. The tissue_context_id is the scenario's target tissue. Mean tissue weight is tissue_expression_weight; max is tissue_sensitivity. All values derived from run trace per_enzyme_mm_rates tissue_weight fields.

mappings.provenance_note: tissue_context_id = scenario tissue field (e.g. Lung, Liver, Bladder). Categorical, not a numeric output port.
tissue_expression_weight = mean(tissue_weight) across enzymes in per_enzyme_mm_rates (those with non-null tissue_weight). Real GTEx-derived values from run trace.
tissue_sensitivity = max(tissue_weight) across enzymes with activation pathway_type. Proxy for peak tissue susceptibility for carcinogenic activation pathway.

adapters.description: Maps all three MutSig outcome module output ports (predicted_SBS_signature, dominant_mutation, confidence) into CEDT state_quality layer variables. All values are real and regression-tested. This adapter provides the richest state_quality population of any module.

mappings.provenance_note: predicted_mutational_signature = run.computed_trace.mutsig_step.predicted_SBS (full list including primary and secondary). Real value from Phase 5 golden run; regression-tested.
dominant_mutation = run.computed_trace.mutsig_step.dominant_mutation. Real string from MutSig module parameters lookup.
evidence_confidence = run.computed_trace.mutsig_step.confidence. Categorical (high/medium/exploratory) from MutSig confidence rule (elevated to high when flux_ratio >= 5.0).

adapters.description: Maps the Evidence and Provenance module's provenance_record output into CEDT state_quality. This is an honest D-maturity adapter: the EVIDENCE module is maturity C and emits a record:provenance output, but does not produce a standalone numeric confidence score. Its evidence_confidence contribution is represented qualitatively via the provenance record content. No direct numeric twin variable is populated from this adapter alone — evidence_confidence is populated by MUTSIG, which itself draws on evidence quality.

mappings.provenance_note: EVIDENCE module is maturity C (D→C in Phase 3). provenance_record is a structured record, not a direct numeric confidence score. evidence_confidence in twin_states is populated from MutSig (which embeds confidence from flux_ratio+evidence quality). The EVIDENCE adapter is honest: it documents that no direct numeric twin value is computed from provenance_record alone. Kept as categorical-lookup to reflect that the provenance DOES inform confidence qualitatively (e.g. high confidence from curated Km/Vmax vs. estimated). Unmapped as a standalone numeric value; reason documented in unmapped list.
